title: Distillation MB
description: Distillation of morpholine under inert condition in order to preserve it and keep it free of oxidation products that form in prolonged contact to atmospheric oxygen.
author: Miha Bukleski
attribution_md:
Distillation MB
Distillation of morpholine under inert condition in order to preserve it and keep it free of oxidation products that form in prolonged contact to atmospheric oxygen.
